identity.name: Kara Ironheart

backgroundFeature.name: Uthgardt Heritage
desc: You have an excellent knowledge of not only your tribe's territory, but also the terrain and natural resources of the rest of the North. You are familiar enough with any wilderness area that you can find twice as much food and water as you normally would when you forage there. Additionally, you can call upon the hospitality of your people, and those allied with your tribe, often including members of the druid circles, tribes of nomadic elves, the Harpers, and the priesthoods devoted to the gods of the First Circle.

identity.backstory:
After hearing elders speak negatively about her always 
being stubborn and too decisive, despite her believing she 
had made well choices, she had begun to have a decreased 
sense of self worth - leading her to join barbaric clans as the 
hot-headed reckless monster that she had started to believe 
she was. After joining the Sky Pony Tribe, she discovered 
that these people were not the dangerous oafs she thought, 
and found peace within herself. She found love and gave 
birth to a beautiful baby boy. She loved her family, but soon 
felt homesick. Her husband was about to depart on a long 
battle, so she returned home to her Mountain dwarf town, 
and raised her son Kellan. She noticed he reflected her 
stubborness, and could tell he did carefully watch before 
making decisions, yet Dwarven neighbours began to 
reprimand him for being careless. She flew into a rage, and 
felt a strong call from her Gods and from deep within her 
maternal nature to protect her son from developing the 
same misguided, tarnished view of himself. Her family 
warned her to be careful - again misidentifying her 
protection for rashness - that she would soon be clanless (a 
dwarf's worst nightmare), however she knew she would 
always have a clan with her Barbarian family, and so she 
took her son back to reunite with her lover, and his father, 
Morgun. While her long life-span informs her perspective 
that dust settles eventually, she has held her loyalty to the 
Barbarians and has adopted a new Barbarian female name. 
She is determined to stay honest to herself, love herself, 
and evoke the same appreciations to her son. Under his 
custody, she has left her boy to mature his early adult-hood 
years with his father, and she has begun her life as an 
adventurer - following that strong call from her Gods she felt 
earlier - to make them proud as she protected other 
vulnerables in valiant battle. Protect now, even if it comes to 
blows. Ask questions later...if they deserve the chance.
Around her neck is a hide leather strap necklace threaded 
through a heavy, yet small forged hunk of metal (not 
particularly pretty to the untrained eye, but it was Kellan's 
first attempt at Dwarven forging), and as Kara runs, the 
bashing of the pendant just below where her clavicle meets, 
reminds her that every stride in battle is to keep his beating 
heart alive with self-love.

personality.flaws:
My temper is a wildfire; once I 
perceive a slight against the 
innocent, I strike before I question.
personality.bonds:
My son, Kellan, is my heart. Everything I 
do in battle is to set an honest example 
that teaches him to stay true to himself.
personality.ideals:
My sense of justice informs my duty to protect those 
who cannot protect themselves, and to show my son 
that a strong will is a gift, not a curse.
personality.traits:
I can be quick to judge and 
scrutinise those close to my clan, 
but I will lay down my life for 
those who are cast aside.

inventory.name: totemic token
inventory.description: My son Kellen's first attempt at Dwarven forging

classFeatures.name: Rage
desc: In battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging, you gain the following benefits if you aren't wearing heavy armor: You have advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. When you make a melee weapon attack using Strength, you gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll. This bonus increases as you level. You have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. If you are able to cast spells, you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging. Your rage lasts for 1 minute. It ends early if you are knocked unconscious or if your turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile creature since your last turn or taken damage since then. You can also end your rage on your turn as a bonus action. Once you have raged the maximum number of times for your barbarian level, you must finish a long rest before you can rage again. You may rage 2 times at 1st level, 3 at 3rd, 4 at 6th, 5 at 12th, and 6 at 17th.

classFeatures.name: Unarmored Defense
desc: While you are not wearing any armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

backgroundFeature.name: Uthgardt Heritage

allies.name: Uthgardt Sky Pony Tribe
allies.description:
The Barbarian Clan: The 
Uthgardt (Sky Pony Tribe). The 
Uthgardt are the legendary 
nomadic barbarians of the 
North. The Sky Pony tribe 
specifically values honor and 
has a mystical connection to 
the divine, often sensed as a "
call from the Gods".
